title: Vibe apps on mobile
excerpt: I have created some apps using Vibe and very pleased with how they have come out, how can i get this on my phone to test? The QR code at the bottom to scan doesn’t seem to do anything, it just opens the Monday.com app on…

posts.author: GregorWilson (Gregor Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created some apps using Vibe and very pleased with how they have come out, how can i get this on my phone to test? The QR code at the bottom to scan doesn’t seem to do anything, it just opens the Monday.com app on my phone.

Screenshot 2026-01-08 084631421×161 11.3 KB

Screenshot 2026-01-08 084638457×872 89.2 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you logged into the ‘right’ monday account on your phone?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @GregorWilson welcome to the community

This is expected. Vibe apps don’t currently support mobile preview or interaction in the monday mobile app. The QR code will just open monday but the app itself only runs on desktop for now.

You can test using the desktop preview in the Vibe builder. Mobile support is on the roadmap.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Monday Wizard

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @GregorWilson!
Make sure you have the most up to date monday mobile app version, we are gradually releasing the support to open vibe apps on mobile.

Another option is to try and open the link via the “copy link” option in the publish menu:

image868×390 30.3 KB

Amichay

posts.author: GregorWilson (Gregor Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Amichay, thank you for your help. I will double check my end. So far we are incredibly impressed with what VIBE has managed to create for us, could be a total game changer for our business.
